action.reasoning: Observation: Local validation of pretrained MetricGAN+ on 50 val files achieved PESQ 2.8637. predict.py is functional with soundfile I/O. Analysis: This pretrained model is state-of-the-art on VoiceBank+DEMAND and represents our best immediate baseline. We need the official eval score and iteration time measurement before any further training. Decision: Submit eval using pretrained_metricgan as checkpoint.
